experience.title: Software Engineer (Backend Lead)
experience.description: Leading backend development for an AI-powered review platform serving the pharmaceutical domain.
highlights: Lead a team of 3-4 backend engineers delivering scalable systems
Designed and developed data pipelines using FastAPI and PostgreSQL for high-volume AI data processing
Implemented workflow orchestration and cron pipelines using Temporal for automated data processing
Built comprehensive data validation and auditing systems for AI chatbot/voicebot output evaluation
Deployed microservices on Kubernetes (OpenShift) using ArgoCD for CI/CD automation
Integrated Azure Entra ID RBAC for enterprise-grade access control
